summary: Iteration 5 testing complete. All critical features verified: Landing page loads without runtime errors (Three.js @react-three/fiber v8 working), all navigation links functional, Hero section with 3D canvas renders correctly and CTAs are clickable (z-index properly configured), all 11 sections render correctly, Chat modal with LLM (GPT-4o-mini) working, Booking modal with date/time selection working, Contact form validation working, FAQ accordion expand/collapse working, Cookie consent banner working, Mobile responsive (390px) with nav toggle working, Admin API endpoints all working with JWT auth. 18/18 backend tests passed.
passed_tests: CRITICAL: Landing page loads without runtime errors (previous 'Cannot read properties of undefined reading S' error fixed by @react-three/fiber v8)
CRITICAL: 3D Canvas does NOT block click interactions on buttons/modals (z-index properly configured)
Navigation: All 6 nav links work (Leistungen, Use Cases, App-Entwicklung, Integrationen, Tarife, FAQ)
Hero section: 3D canvas background renders, CTAs visible and clickable
Solutions section: 6 cards render with correct titles (KI-Assistenz, Automationen, Integrationen, Wissenssysteme, Dokumentenautomation, Enterprise Solutions)
Use Cases section: Bento grid layout renders correctly
App Development section: 6 cards + highlight card render
Process section: 4 steps with 3D pipeline render
Integrations section: 64 items render with 3D globe
Governance section: Compliance cards render
Pricing section: 3 tiers (Starter ab 1.900, Growth ab 4.500, Enterprise Individuell) with correct prices
FAQ section: 7 items, accordion expand/collapse works (only one open at a time)
Contact form: Validation works (4 error messages shown for empty fields)
Chat modal: Opens via 'Beratung starten' button, has 6 sidebar presets, can send messages, LLM responds
Booking modal: Opens via CTA buttons, date selection (10 dates), time selection (12 slots), form validation works
Cookie consent banner: Shows on first visit, dismiss works (both accept and reject)
Footer: All legal page links present (/impressum, /datenschutz, /agb, /ki-hinweise)
Mobile responsive (390x844): Nav toggle works, mobile menu opens/closes, no horizontal scrollbar, 20px container padding
Admin API: Login works with correct credentials (p.courbois@icloud.com / NxAi#Secure2026!)
Admin API: /stats, /leads, /bookings endpoints all return correct data
Backend: 18/18 pytest tests passed (health, company, contact, booking, chat, analytics, admin auth, admin dashboard)
critical_code_review_comments: Three.js 3D animations working correctly with @react-three/fiber v8 (downgraded from v9 for React 18 compatibility)
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes (39 total)
Legal pages properly implemented with NL law references (Burgerlijk Wetboek, UAVG, Boek 6 BW, EU AI Act)
LLM chat uses GPT-4o-mini via Emergent key - real responses, not mocked
Note: Headless Chrome crashes (SIGSEGV) on some pages due to WebGL - this is a headless browser limitation, not a bug

test_credentials.note: Password stored in backend/.env as ADMIN_PASSWORD

seed_data_creation: Test leads and bookings created via pytest during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified in iteration 5: 1) Three.js 3D animations work with @react-three/fiber v8, 2) All 11 sections render correctly, 3) Chat modal with LLM (GPT-4o-mini) working, 4) Booking modal with date/time selection working, 5) Contact form validation working, 6) FAQ accordion working, 7) Cookie consent working, 8) Mobile responsive working, 9) Admin API working with JWT auth, 10) Legal pages have NL law references. Note: Headless Chrome may crash (SIGSEGV) on pages with WebGL - this is a browser limitation, not a bug. Use curl for API testing if browser crashes.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live - Chat uses GPT-4o-mini via Emergent key, Booking creates real DB entries, Email notifications via Resend

features_verified.navigation: All 6 links work, mobile toggle works
features_verified.cookie_consent: Shows on first visit, dismiss works
features_verified.mobile_responsive: Nav toggle, no horizontal scroll, proper padding
features_verified.admin_api: Login, stats, leads, bookings all working
